title: Business chamber has its monthly meet
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Various business owners and guest speakers gathered in the Diaz Hotel and Resort on Tuesday 21 October for the monthly Mossel Bay Business Chamber networking evening.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Various business owners and guest speakers gathered in the Diaz Hotel and Resort on Tuesday 21 October for the monthly Mossel Bay Business Chamber networking evening."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"This month's guest speaker was Francois Swanepoel, CEO of the Sentraal-Suid Koöperasie (SSK)."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"His topic was the road ahead for the SSK and to provide an update on the exciting new Agriland Mossel Bay development.","html":"His topic was the road ahead for the SSK and to provide an update on the exciting new Agriland Mossel Bay development."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The SSK is an agricultural company serving farmers primarily in the Southern Cape, Overberg, Langkloof and Karoo regions.","html":"The SSK is an agricultural company serving farmers primarily in the Southern Cape, Overberg, Langkloof and Karoo regions."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Swanepoel emphasised continuous growth within the SSK and the farming industry, including the development of Agriland. \"If you aren't around the table, you are on the menu,\" he said.","html":"Swanepoel emphasised continuous growth within the SSK and the farming industry, including the development of Agriland. \"If you aren't around the table, you are on the menu,\" he said."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Agriland, located in Voorbaai, has been undergoing renovations throughout the year. According to Swanepoel, it is hoped those renovations will be concluded by June 2026."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Other speakers throughout the evening included Carol Walton of the Seabird and Penguin Rehabilitation Centre (Saprec) in Mossel Bay and the communications officer for the Mossel Bay Municipality, Cornelle Carstens-Johnston.","html":"Other speakers throughout the evening included Carol Walton of the Seabird and Penguin Rehabilitation Centre (Saprec) in Mossel Bay and the communications officer for the Mossel Bay Municipality, Cornelle Carstens-Johnston."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Walton showcased the work her team does for the protection and care of injured seabirds that appear along the coast, while Carstens-Johnston shared some insights into the municipality's official communication channels and how to best utilise them.","html":"Walton showcased the work her team does for the protection and care of injured seabirds that appear along the coast, while Carstens-Johnston shared some insights into the municipality's official communication channels and how to best utilise them."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Vision 2050, a proposal for the future of Mossel Bay and the Garden Route as a whole, and its progress were also highlighted.","html":"Vision 2050, a proposal for the future of Mossel Bay and the Garden Route as a whole, and its progress were also highlighted."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The winners of a lucky draw received some bottles of wine before the group enjoyed their dinner."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The final Mossel Bay Business Chamber networking evening for the year will be held on 21 November, with Group Editors' CEO Servaas de Kock as the guest speaker.","html":"The final Mossel Bay Business Chamber networking evening for the year will be held on 21 November, with Group Editors' CEO Servaas de Kock as the guest speaker."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Business chamber has its monthly meet
